# Woon Ho Family Care Centre

###### We are located at Kempas Baru, Johor Bahru

### We are striving to provide the best affordable nursing care services at our Nursing Home in Johor Bahru (JB).

[Nursing Home in Johor Bahru (JB)](https://woonhofamilycarecentre.com.my/nursing-home-in-johor-bahru/)

###### Respect & Compassion

## [Nursing Care Services](https://woonhofamilycarecentre.com.my/nursing-care-services/)

[服务详情-中文版](https://woonhofamilycarecentre.com.my/?page_id=291)

#### Family-like  
Environment

Woon Ho have a spacious outdoor living area with the big lawn garden.

#### 24-hour  
Nursing Care

We provide 24-hour nursing care services.

#### On-call  
Doctors

Our nursing team will assist to contact doctors when needed. 

#### Doctors  
Regular visits

Complimentary doctor consultation, twice a month.

#### Daily Fun  
Activities

Stay active and energetic with various daily activities.

#### Nutritious  
Meals

4 nutritious meals carefully planned and served daily.

#### Physiotherapy  
Programme

Advanced physiotherapy and rehabilitation programme.

#### Ambulance  
Services

Ambulance and escort services upon emergency.
